recommendations.title: The Witness
recommendations.overview: A brother's journey to unravel the truth about the mythic death and little known life of Kitty Genovese, who was reportedly murdered in front of 38 witnesses and has become the face of urban apathy.

recommendations.title: Free to Play
recommendations.overview: Follow three professional video game players as they overcome personal adversity, family pressures, and the realities of life to compete in a $1,000,000 tournament that could change their lives forever.

recommendations.title: Bobby Fischer Against the World
recommendations.overview: The first documentary feature to explore the tragic and bizarre life of the late chess master Bobby Fischer.

recommendations.title: Choose
recommendations.overview: Fiona Wagner, a journalism student, tracks a cold-blooded killer with the help of her detective father and a therapist.

recommendations.title: Hereditary
recommendations.overview: Following the death of the Leigh family matriarch, Annie and her children uncover disturbing secrets about their heritage. Their daily lives are not only impacted, but they also become entangled in a chilling fate from which they cannot escape, drivi

recommendations.title: The Cloverfield Paradox
recommendations.overview: Orbiting above a planet on the brink of war, scientists test a device to solve an energy crisis and end up face-to-face with a dark alternate reality.

recommendations.title: The Remarkable Life of Ibelin
recommendations.overview: The secret life of a young World of Warcraft gamer is vividly reimagined when his online friends contact his family after his death.

recommendations.title: They Shall Not Grow Old
recommendations.overview: A documentary about World War I with never-before-seen footage to commemorate the centennial of Armistice Day, and the end of the war.

recommendations.title: Lover, Stalker, Killer
recommendations.overview: In this twisting documentary, a mechanic tries online dating for the first time and meets a woman who takes romantic obsession to a deadly extreme.

recommendations.title: God's Pocket
recommendations.overview: A boozy lowlife tries to bury the truth about his crazy stepson's suspicious death, but a nosy newspaper columnist and the young man's mother complicate matters.
